variants.title: Donaldson P175353 Gasket
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P175353 Gasket is designed to provide reliable performance in gasket applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Gasket, Outer Diameter: 70.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 65.0 mm
